title: hieracium eupatorium subsp. inuloides
intro: Hieracium eupatorium subsp. inuloides, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe, Asia, and parts of North America. The medicinal properties of Hieracium eupatorium subsp. inuloides include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of Hieracium eupatorium subsp. inuloides include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to make a medicinal drink or applied topically to affected areas.
